classification.stance_proposed: research_blocked; do not advance to a security decision until the critical acceptance tests are met.

one_line_thesis: Mesabi Trust is a contractual iron ore pellet royalty on Cleveland-Cliffs' Northshore (Silver Bay, MN): cash is cyclical commodity + bonus-tier optionality, with ongoing AAA arbitration (commenced Sep 2025) layered on statutory trust simplicity—hold at 8.4% normalized yield for the incumbent royalty sleeve; do not downgrade on depressed Q1 bonus alone.

deep_dive.executive_summary: Mesabi Trust is a contractual pellet royalty on Cliffs' Northshore mine with cyclical commodity exposure and a legal recovery option. FY2026 10-K confirms AAA arbitration commenced September 26, 2025 on idling and intercompany pricing; Horizon Kinetics holds 22.9%. Q1 2026 bonus royalty was zero despite tonnage doubling YoY; Q4 2025 still paid $1.04 million bonus, showing mechanics intact. Nine-month royalty income fell to $13.16 million on lower pricing and a February 2025 maintenance shutdown. At $25.68 (Stooq, May 26, 2026), normalized distribution yield is 8.4% (~$2.16/unit per year); t...

human_review.model_stance: research_blocked; do not advance to a security decision until the critical acceptance tests are met.

investment_committee.strongest_dissent: The apparent asset value may be illusory because Cliffs controls a finite swing mine and can minimize third-party pricing evidence and production cadence.
unresolved_items: An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.

decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

components.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
components.evidence: Primary Q1 2025/Q1 2026 royalty reports establish shipped tons, base/bonus outcomes, and the 2026 $71.70/ton bonus threshold; reserve life and full contractual base-tier table remain operator-controlled. Provisional $30/$35/$42 pending reproducible PV bridge. See MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
components.scenario_assumptions: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
components.evidence: The prior AAA award was paid in full on 2024-10-04: $71.185 million, or approximately $5.43 per unit (MSB 8-K filed 2024-10-17). The September 2025 arbitration is disclosed in MSB's 2025-09-26 8-K and 2026 Form 10-K Item 3, but neither filing states a claim amount, schedule, probability, or collectibility. Base value is therefore explicitly zero; the $13 high case is an unapproved upside sensitivity only. See MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
components.scenario_assumptions: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.

change_log.author: valuation-contract-v2 migration
change_log.reason: Retire unsupported analyst ranges and make calculation lineage authoritative.
changes: Producing royalty stream changed from provisional $30/$35/$42 to unpriced pending a reserve and royalty distribution schedule.
Standalone concentration reserve changed from additive -$5/-$3/-$1 to an embedded risk control so depletion and downtime cannot be counted twice.
Current arbitration changed from $0/$0/$13 to unpriced; the historical award remains context, not a current payoff estimate.
Trust reserve changed from $1/$2/$3 to calculated $18.341533m / 13.12001m units.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

options.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
options.evidence: The prior AAA award was paid in full on 2024-10-04: $71.185 million, or approximately $5.43 per unit (MSB 8-K filed 2024-10-17). The September 2025 arbitration is disclosed in MSB's 2025-09-26 8-K and 2026 Form 10-K Item 3, but neither filing states a claim amount, schedule, probability, or collectibility. Base value is therefore explicitly zero; the $13 high case is an unapproved upside sensitivity only. See MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
options.scenario_assumptions: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.

probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

options.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
options.falsifier: Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.strongest_dissent: The apparent asset value may be illusory because Cliffs controls a finite swing mine and can minimize third-party pricing evidence and production cadence.
unresolved_items: An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.
committee.next_action: Close the committee's primary-evidence blockers before requesting an owner decision.

gaps.question: Reconcile the primary legal record, outcomes, timing, collectibility, and ensure ordinary royalties are not counted twice.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: MSB's 2024-10-17 8-K documents full payment of the prior $71.185M AAA award, while the 2025-09-26 8-K and 2026 Form 10-K Item 3 document the new September 2025 arbitration and its subject matter (MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md). No primary filing discloses the new claim amount, remedy, schedule, probability, or collectibility. The valuation component now assigns $0 in the base case and retains only a $13/share high sensitivity for separately evidenced incremental recovery.

gaps.question: Reconcile trust units, contractual royalty tiers, reserves, production, realized pellet prices, bonuses, taxes, and depletion.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: 2026 Form 10-K/Exhibit 13 reconciles 13,120,010 units and a $20.403M unallocated reserve; the 2025-05-02 and 2026-05-04 royalty-report exhibits reconcile Q1 shipped tons, base royalty, bonus royalty, and the $71.70/ton 2026 bonus threshold (MSB/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md). The primary record still lacks Cliffs/Northshore's recoverable-reserve, production-cadence, realized-pellet-price, and full royalty-tier schedules needed to reproduce the $30/$35/$42 producing-stream and -$5/-$3/-$1 depletion ranges.

gaps.question: An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.
gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

Mesabi Trust is a contractual pellet royalty on Cliffs' Northshore mine with cyclical commodity exposure and a legal recovery option. FY2026 10-K confirms AAA arbitration commenced September 26, 2025 on idling and intercompany pricing; Horizon Kinetics holds 22.9%. Q1 2026 bonus royalty was zero despite tonnage doublin

risk_claims.claim: EPS (basic) growth moved from -96.5% to -70.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
Rare negative YoY quarter(s): YoY growth moved to -12.1% to -70.0% YoY (baseline median +31.5% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
*Primary risk: Persistently sub-threshold pellet pricing keeps bonus royalty at zero and distributions below normalized ~$2/unit per year.
